nasb.text: That you may nurse and be satisfied with her comforting breasts, That you may suck and be delighted with her bountiful bosom.”

esv.text: that you may nurse and be satisfied from her consoling breast; that you may drink deeply with delight from her glorious abundance.”

cnv.text: 好使你們能在她那安慰人的懷裡吃奶得飽； 使你們能從她豐盛的榮耀裡擠奶而吃，滿心喜樂。”

ccb.text: 你们必在她舒适的怀抱里得到满足， 如婴儿欢快地在母亲怀中吮吸充足的奶汁。”

csbs.text: 好使你们从她安慰的怀中吃奶而饱足， 使你们从她饱满的乳房吸乳而欢畅！
